description_long: This object is a classic Macintosh Plus computer monitor, featuring a boxy, off-white plastic exterior with a slightly slanted front face. The front view displays a built-in monochrome CRT screen surrounded by a thick bezel, with a floppy disk drive slot and a small rectangular button below the screen. The rear panel includes a recessed area with a label, ventilation slots, and several visible ports for connectivity. The sides are plain and flat, with subtle angular chamfers at the top rear corners. The monitor sits directly on its base, with no separate stand, and the overall design is utilitarian and robust, typical of 1980s personal computers. The Apple rainbow logo and 'Macintosh Plus' branding are visible on the front bezel.
description: A vintage Macintosh Plus computer monitor with a thick bezel, built-in CRT screen, and front disk drive slot, finished in off-white plastic.
description_view_0: The left side of the monitor, showing a plain, flat surface with a slight angular cut at the top rear corner.
description_view_1: The front view, featuring the CRT screen, thick bezel, floppy disk drive slot, button, and Apple logo with 'Macintosh Plus' branding.
description_view_2: The right side, nearly identical to the left, with a plain surface and angular rear corner.
description_view_3: The rear view, showing a recessed label area, ventilation slots, power switch, and multiple connectivity ports.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, flat, and made of off-white plastic, with slightly rounded corners and a matte finish. It frames the display area with a utilitarian, retro aesthetic and features a subtle texture.
attribute_stand_type: No separate stand; the monitor has an integrated flat base as part of its main body, providing direct support on flat surfaces.
attribute_button_placement: A single rectangular button is located on the lower right of the front bezel, just below the floppy disk slot.
attribute_port_visibility: Visible on the rear panel, with multiple ports arranged horizontally along the bottom edge.
attribute_brand_logo: A small Apple rainbow logo is present on the lower left of the front bezel, next to the 'Macintosh Plus' text.
